content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://journals.ametsoc.org/view/journals/clim/26/15/jcli-d-12-00341.1.xml", "source_title": "Diagnosing present and future permafrost from climate models", "source_type": "web", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "Socioeconomic impacts of permafrost degradation may also prove costly (Larsen et al. 2008).", "direct_quote": "Socioeconomic impacts of permafrost degradation may also prove costly (Larsen et al. 2008).", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Permafrost degradation has recently been observed in many locations including Sweden (Akerman and Johansson 2008), Canada (Fortier et al. 20...", "direct_quote": "Permafrost degradation has recently been observed in many locations including Sweden (Akerman and Johansson 2008), Canada (Fortier et al. 2007; Thibault and Payette 2009), Alaska (Jorgenson et al. 2006), and Tibet (Cheng and Wu 2007).", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Ground temperatures are warming across the majority of permafrost regions (Romanovsky et al. 2010) and occasionally large rapid changes are ...", "direct_quote": "Ground temperatures are warming across the majority of permafrost regions (Romanovsky et al. 2010) and occasionally large rapid changes are seen (Oberman 2008).", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts."}]}
